bug.description: incorrect flags or bitmask passed to a system or library function

prompt:
There is a incorrect flags or bitmask passed to a system or library function downstream of function free_td16 in the openair1/PHY/CODING subsystem.
The function is located at openair1/PHY/CODING/3gpplte_turbo_decoder_sse_16bit.c:913.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
